title: Poached Chicken and Basil Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy dish that combines the flavors of poached chicken and fresh basil in a tasty stir-fry.
instructions: Poach the chicken breast in boiling water for 10-12 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the chopped basil leaves and cook for 1 minute, until wilted.
Add the poached chicken to the wok or skillet and stir in the stir-fry sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
